programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Angoori becomes upset with Tiwaris behaviour and decides to leave the house. Later, Vibhuti takes Angoori to his house, but Anita is unhappy about it.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Tiwari lodges a complaint with Happu, alleging that Vibhuti has compelled Angoori to reside at his residence. Later, Vibhuti deceives Angoori and brings her back to his house.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Tiwari orders a man to get Angoori abducted and asks him to bring her to his house. However, things take a hilarious turn when Anita gets kidnapped.

programme.title: Saamy 2
programme.desc: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathans daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

programme.title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
programme.desc: Police officer Happu Singh lives a fun filled life with his large family that includes his mother, his wife and nine children. But he often finds himself in comical troubles of his own making.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Gandhi Circuit
programme.desc: Gandhi Circuit S01 E02.

programme.desc: Gandhi Circuit S01 E04.

programme.title: Comedy Circus Ka Naya Daur
programme.desc: After 4 years and 12 successful seasons, the veterans of Comedy Circus now pair up with fresh talent.This season sees a veteran paired with a celeb, mentoring a team with a new talent and a celeb.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Police officer Happu Singh lives a fun filled life with his large family that includes his mother, his wife and nine children. But he often finds himself in comical troubles of his own making.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Manmohan, unaware that Deepu is Vibhuti in disguise, asks him to help Angoori with her chores; Manmohan tells Anita that he plans on appointing Deepu as their full-time servant.

programme.title: Yeh Kaali Kaali Raatein
programme.desc: An anthology of stories that revolve around people experiencing paranormal activities, supernatural elements and frightening entities.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Angoori informs her mother-in-law of Manmohans accident and memory loss. Later, Manmohans staff member comes back with Anitas saree.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Manmohan secretly enters Anitas house and thinks she is hugging a stranger. Later, Manmohan discovers Vibhutis secret identity, Zaleel Kamin Puri who is a famous poet, and reveals it to everyone.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti asks Angoori to accompany him so he can prove to her that Manmohan is having an affair. Later, Vibhuti conducts a DNA test on the hair strand, only to find that it belongs to Angoori.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti ignores Angoori to make feel restless and come to him. Instead, Angoori stops talking to him in an effort to get him to approach her.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: In an attempt to socialise more, Anita invites Angoori and Manmohan over for dinner. Meanwhile, Vibhuti makes arrangements to cook in an effort to impress Angoori.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: There is a bet between Tiwari and Angoori on who can control the house expenses efficiently. They divide 10,000 rupees among themselves and start on the plan.

programme.title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
programme.desc: Police officer Happu Singh lives a fun filled life with his large family that includes his mother, his wife and nine children. But he often finds himself in comical troubles of his own making.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Manmohan drags Deepu home and orders him to clean the kitchen. Meanwhile, Anita asks Vibhuti about his day and he tells her that his body hurts from doing all the work.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Anita asks Vibhuti to explain why he kept a cake and gifts in his drawer. Meanwhile, Manmohan tells Vibhuti that he suspects Anita of having an affair with an American man.

programme.title: Ssshhhh... Phir Koi Hai
programme.desc: Mysterious stories unfold where unsuspecting characters confront sinister forces, haunted places and paranormal occurrences that shake the foundations of reality.

programme.title: Ssshhhh... Phir Koi Hai
programme.desc: Mysterious stories unfold where unsuspecting characters confront sinister forces, haunted places and paranormal occurrences that shake the foundations of reality.

programme.title: Ssshhhh... Phir Koi Hai
programme.desc: Mysterious stories unfold where unsuspecting characters confront sinister forces, haunted places and paranormal occurrences that shake the foundations of reality.

programme.title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
programme.desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all. S01 E216, India.

programme.title: Happy Hours
programme.desc: Artists and comedians take the stage to perform hilarious skits and stand-up routines on relatable topics pertaining to social media.

programme.title: Atal
programme.desc: Influenced by his mothers beliefs and values, young Atal dreams of a united India. From humble beginnings, he goes on to shape the countrys destiny as one of Indias most important leaders.

programme.title: Bheema - Andhkaar Se Adhikaar Tak
programme.desc: Bheema, advocating for the lower-caste community, sets a condition for the upper caste. Elsewhere, Kalika advises Dharmshila to forget the past and start anew.

programme.desc: Mysterious stories unfold where unsuspecting characters confront sinister forces, haunted places and paranormal occurrences that shake the foundations of reality.

programme.desc: Police officer Happu Singh lives a fun filled life with his large family that includes his mother, his wife and nine children. But he often finds himself in comical troubles of his own making.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each others wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.
